import gymnasium as gym
import humanoid_bench  # noqa: F401, registers envs

tasks = [
    'h1hand-walk-v0',
    'h1hand-stand-v0',
    'h1hand-run-v0',
    'h1hand-sit_simple-v0',
    'h1hand-balance_simple-v0',
    'h1hand-reach-v0',
    'h1hand-push-v0',
    'h1hand-pole-v0',
    'h1hand-door-v0',
    'h1hand-package-v0',
]

print('Checking HumanoidBench environments...')
for task in tasks:
    try:
        env = gym.make(task)
        obs_space = env.observation_space
        act_space = env.action_space
        max_eps = env.spec.max_episode_steps
        print(f'{task}: obs_dim={obs_space.shape}, act_dim={act_space.shape}, max_steps={max_eps}')
        obs, info = env.reset(seed=0)
        action = act_space.sample()
        obs, reward, terminated, truncated, info = env.step(action)
        print(f'  step1: reward={reward:.3f}, terminated={terminated}, truncated={truncated}')
        print(f'  info keys: {list(info.keys())}')
        has_success = 'success' in info
        print(f'  info has success: {has_success}')
        env.close()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'ERROR with {task}: {e}')
